title: Claude Code Leak: What's Happening?
summary: A video breakdown of the Claude Code source code leak via an NPM .map file, discussing the TypeScript harness architecture, three-layer memory system, token subsidization economics, privacy implications with Datadog, and the feasibility of running leaked Claude Code locally on home servers. The discussion frames this as an opportunity for solopreneurs to reduce dependency on third-party AI platforms.
